inputs.description: Add run_pass_2() to scripts/enrichment/batch_wikipedia.py. Fetch Wikipedia summaries for all agents in wikipedia_cache, ordered by connectivity (most connections first). Use fetch_summary() for each. Extract name variants from first paragraph using regex (parenthetical names, Hebrew text). Store summary_extract and name_variants in wikipedia_cache. Add _extract_name_variants() helper. Test with --limit 10 first, then run full pass. Commit.
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run python -m scripts.enrichment.batch_wikipedia --pass 2 --db data/index/bibliographic.db --limit 10 2>&1 | tail -10
